title: Symphony Service Specification – Draft v1
description: Long-running daemon that turns Linear issues into isolated coding-agent runs using a repo-owned WORKFLOW.md contract.

workspace.containment: MUST be strict prefix check + symlink escape prevention

testableSuccessCriteria.coreConformance: All bullets in spec §17.1–17.7 must pass
testableSuccessCriteria.realIntegration: §17.8 smoke test with real Linear credentials
safetyInvariants: No agent launch if containment fails

definitionOfDone: 100% unit test coverage of reference algorithms (§16)
E2E tests cover every case in §17
Operator can run ./symphony path/to/WORKFLOW.md and see live dashboard

elixirImplementationStatus.summary: The Elixir implementation is fully spec-compliant across all 51 PRD test cases (§17.1-§17.7). All 6 architectural layers are implemented. Fixes addressed defensive workflow reload (§6.2) and added test coverage for Todo blockers, stall detection, per-state concurrency, dispatch sort order, global slot exhaustion, and startup terminal cleanup. Previously reported gaps RG-003 (user_input_required) and RG-005 (partial JSON buffering) were found to be already covered by existing tests.

testFiles.core_test.exs: Orchestrator dispatch, retry, reconciliation, prompt builder, agent runner E2E
testFiles.workspace_and_config_test.exs: Workspace lifecycle, hooks, containment, config defaults, $VAR resolution, Linear normalization
testFiles.app_server_test.exs: Codex protocol handshake, CWD validation, timeout/exit handling, dynamic tools
testFiles.dynamic_tool_test.exs: linear_graphql tool spec, validation, error handling
testFiles.cli_test.exs: CLI arg parsing, workflow path resolution, startup errors
testFiles.extensions_test.exs: WorkflowStore reload, tracker delegation, Phoenix observability API, dashboard LiveView
testFiles.orchestrator_status_test.exs: Snapshot state, token accounting, rate limits, TPS graph, status dashboard rendering, stall restart

remainingGaps.title: Real Linear integration smoke test
remainingGaps.description: No E2E test with real Linear credentials. Should be @tag :skip_ci when secrets unavailable.

resolvedGaps.resolution: Now tested in core_test.exs — global slot exhaustion defers candidate to next tick
Now tested in core_test.exs — startup terminal cleanup removes workspaces for terminal issues
Already tested in app_server_test.exs — app server marks request-for-input events as a hard failure
Already tested in app_server_test.exs — app server buffers partial JSON lines until newline terminator

keyTests: config defaults and validation checks
config reads defaults for optional settings
config resolves $VAR references
config supports per-state max concurrent agent overrides
workflow file path defaults to WORKFLOW.md
workflow load accepts prompt-only files
workflow load rejects non-map front matter
workflow store reloads changes, keeps last good workflow
prompt builder uses strict variable rendering
prompt builder uses a sensible default template when blank
workspace path is deterministic per issue identifier
workspace reuses existing issue directory without deleting local changes
workspace rejects stale non-directory paths with typed error
workspace rejects symlink escapes under configured root
workspace remove rejects the workspace root itself
workspace surfaces after_create hook failures
workspace surfaces after_create hook timeouts
workspace hooks support multiline YAML scripts
workspace remove continues when before_remove hook fails/times out
workspace creates an empty directory when no bootstrap hook is configured
app server rejects workspace root and paths outside workspace root
linear client normalizes blockers from inverse relations
linear client marks explicitly unassigned issues as not routed to worker
linear client pagination merge helper preserves issue ordering
linear client logs response bodies for non-200 graphql responses
fetch issues by states with empty state set is a no-op
linear adapter delegates reads and validates mutation responses
dispatch sort order: priority ascending, created_at oldest first, identifier tie-breaker
todo issue with non-terminal blockers is not dispatched
todo issue with all-terminal blockers is eligible for dispatch
per-state concurrency limit blocks dispatch when state limit is reached
stalled running issue is terminated and retry is scheduled
stall detection is skipped when stall_timeout_ms is zero
non-active issue state stops running agent without cleaning workspace
terminal issue state stops running agent and cleans workspace
reconcile updates running issue state for active issues
reconcile stops running issue when tracker refresh omits it
reconcile stops running issue when it is reassigned
normal worker exit schedules active-state continuation retry
abnormal worker exit increments retry attempt progressively
dispatch revalidation skips stale todo issue once a non-terminal blocker appears
orchestrator restarts stalled workers with retry backoff
global slot exhaustion defers candidate to next tick
startup terminal cleanup removes workspaces for issues in terminal states
app server starts with workspace cwd and expected startup command
app server startup command supports codex args override
app server startup payload uses configurable approval and sandbox settings
app server maps startup read timeout to response_timeout
app server maps early subprocess exit to port_exit
agent runner keeps workspace after successful codex run
agent runner forwards timestamped codex updates to recipient
agent runner continues with a follow-up turn while issue remains active
agent runner stops continuing once agent.max_turns is reached
app server marks request-for-input events as a hard failure
app server buffers partial JSON lines until newline terminator
tool_specs advertises the linear_graphql input contract
tool_specs hides linear_graphql when workflow disables it
unsupported tools return a failure payload
linear_graphql returns successful GraphQL responses as tool text
linear_graphql rejects multi-operation documents
linear_graphql validates required arguments
orchestrator snapshot reflects last codex update and session id
orchestrator snapshot tracks codex thread totals and app-server pid
orchestrator snapshot tracks codex rate-limit payloads
phoenix observability api preserves state, issue, and refresh responses
dashboard bootstraps liveview from embedded static assets
dashboard liveview renders and refreshes over pubsub
status dashboard computes rolling 5-second token throughput
status dashboard renders 10-minute TPS graph snapshot
application configures a rotating file logger handler
defaults to WORKFLOW.md when workflow path is missing
uses an explicit workflow path override when provided
returns not found when workflow file does not exist
returns startup error when app cannot start
returns ok when workflow exists and app starts
